hero.title: We build professional websites and web apps
hero.desc: Clean Code delivers scalable products, fast integrations, and polished digital experiences.

integration.title: Long experience integrating with third parties
integration.desc: We connect your product with local and international platforms so payments, maps, analytics, and tools work smoothly together.

tech.title: Top technologies we use
tech.desc: A modern stack of web and app tools used to build reliable products with fast performance.

services.title: Our Services
services.intro: We offer a full suite of services to launch and grow your web or app product with speed and quality across Egypt.

items.title: Web Development
items.desc: High-performance websites built with Next.js, clean architecture, and SEO-ready structure so your business ranks and converts.

items.title: Web Apps & Dashboards
items.desc: Custom web applications with secure auth, live data, and polished admin panels for teams that need real operational tools.

items.title: Support & Maintenance
items.desc: Ongoing updates, security patches, uptime monitoring, and performance tuning so your product stays stable after launch.

items.title: UI/UX Design
items.desc: Clear user flows, branded interfaces, and responsive layouts designed to feel premium on every screen size.

items.title: E-commerce Solutions
items.desc: Online stores with product catalogs, checkout, payment gateways, and inventory dashboards built for growth in Egypt.

items.title: API & System Integrations
items.desc: Connect payments, CRM, analytics, maps, and third-party tools into one reliable backend your product can depend on.

services.webDesc: Build modern, responsive websites with performance-first architecture, strong SEO, and fast load times.
services.appsDesc: Interactive applications with polished UI, user flows, and live data integrations for desktop and mobile.
services.supportDesc: Continuous updates, security improvements, and environment monitoring so your product stays stable.
services.ctaDesc: Tell us your idea and we will help you plan the right product architecture and launch timeline.
services.flowDesc: From discovery and design to development and launch, every service includes strong quality checks and simplified management.

about.title: About Us
about.desc: Clean Code is a software and programming company in Egypt building clean, scalable websites and web apps for businesses across all governorates.
about.intro: Clean Code is a team of developers, designers, and product thinkers who build clean digital experiences for growing businesses in Cairo, Giza, Alexandria, and across Egypt.
about.mission: Deliver fully branded web products that scale, load fast, and make your business more visible online on Google and social channels.
about.vision: Help Egyptian clients integrate modern systems, launch quickly, and maintain strong user trust over time.
about.values: Transparency, fast delivery, great UX, and flexible collaboration are the foundation of every project.
about.footerTitle: We build products for web and mobile-first audiences
about.footerDesc: Every project is designed to work across devices and connect with tools like payments, analytics, and CRM systems — in Arabic and English.

projects.title: Latest Projects
projects.intro: Discover our latest web projects and applications delivered with strong architecture and user experience for businesses in Egypt and beyond.
